name: SidebarRoot
description: Collapsible side navigation panel. Renders as <aside> with expandable/collapsible state.
whenToUse: For persistent app-level navigation in dashboard or admin layouts.
avoidWhen: For temporary navigation panels - use Sheet or Drawer.
accessibilityRequirements: aria-label on <aside>. Toggle button for collapse/expand.

parts.name: SidebarHeader
parts.description: Header section of a Sidebar (logo, brand, etc.).

parts.name: SidebarContent
parts.description: Main scrollable content area of a Sidebar.

parts.name: SidebarFooter
parts.description: Footer section of a Sidebar (settings, user info, etc.).

parts.name: SidebarSection
parts.description: Collapsible navigation section with optional title.

parts.name: SidebarItem
parts.description: Navigation item inside a SidebarSection. Link or button.

parts.name: SidebarToggle
parts.description: Button that toggles sidebar between expanded and collapsed.

parts.name: SidebarSeparator
parts.whenToUse: Between SidebarSection components to create visual grouping.

examples.title: Collapsible Sidebar
